description_long: This is a modern, freestanding cabinet with a rectangular form and a rich, dark wood finish. The front features a combination of a tall vertical door on the left and four horizontal drawers on the right, all with sleek, dark gray or black panels and minimalist handles. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood grain texture without any additional features or openings. The cabinet appears sturdy and is likely constructed from engineered wood or similar material, with a smooth, semi-glossy finish. Its design is functional and contemporary, suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or garages. The overall build suggests ample storage space inside, accessible via the door and drawers.
description: A modern, dark wood cabinet with a tall door and four drawers featuring sleek, dark panels and minimalist handles. The design is sturdy, functional, and suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a plain, flat wood surface with no visible features.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying a tall vertical door on the left, four horizontal drawers on the right, and minimalist handles.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, similar to the left, with a plain wood surface and no visible features.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, showing a continuous wood grain surface with no openings or hardware.
